name: Sunny Reef
short_description: Forget civilization. Forget comfort. Your yacht has crashed and you find yourself the sole survivor on the deceptively beautiful Sunny Reef. Snow-white beaches and crystal clear water hide a ruthless struggle for survival, where danger comes not only from nature.
detailed_description:
Forget civilization. Forget comfort. Your yacht has crashed and you find yourself the sole survivor on the deceptively beautiful Sunny Reef. Snow-white beaches and crystal clear water hide a ruthless struggle for survival, where danger comes not only from nature.

Explore a dangerous world: In addition to lush jungles and shipwrecks, Sunny Reef is a grim reminder of civilization - a rusting car junkyard and a small town inhabited by hostile people. They don't welcome outsiders and are ready to protect their resources at any cost.

Crafting and building: Among the debris of civilization you will find valuable materials to create weapons, tools and strengthen your shelter. Turn the junkyard into your arsenal and build an impregnable fortress to defend yourself against wild animals and even wilder people.

Survival at all costs: Hunt, fish and gather edible plants to satisfy hunger and thirst. Be careful - resources are limited and you'll have to fight for every morsel. Learn to hide, cheat and fight to survive in this hostile world.

Features:

Realistic crafting and building system that utilizes junkyard resources

Hostile NPCs with unique behaviors and motivations

Diverse flora and fauna, including dangerous predators

Colorful graphics and exciting atmosphere contrasting with the grim reality of the island
